zh.lifeSummary: 當Ezekiel Richardson於1604年出生在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾時，他的父親Thomas Richardson35歲，母親Katherine Duxford39歲。他於1630年2月25日與Susannah結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1647年10月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年43歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州希爾斯波洛佩勒姆諾斯 佩勒姆 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Ezekiel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, pronounced ‘iz-ee-kee-el’: meaning ‘God strengthens’ in Hebrew. This was borne by one of the major prophets. The book of the Bible that bears his name is known for its vision of a field of dry bones, which Ezekiel prophesies will live again (chapter 37). His prophecies were addressed to the Jews in Babylonian exile, after Nebuchadnezzar had seized Jerusalem in 597 bc .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Ezekiel Richardson was born in 1604, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Richardson, was 35 and his mother, Katherine Duxford, was 39. He married Susannah on 25 February 1630. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 October 1647, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 43, and was buried in North Pelham Cemetery, Pelham, Hillsborough, New Hampshire, United States.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ezekiel Richardson nasceu em 1604, em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Richardson, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Duxford, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Susannah em 25 de fevereiro de 1630. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1647, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em North Pelham Cemetery, Pelham, Hillsborough, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ezekiel Richardson родился в 1604 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Richardson было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Duxford, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Susannah 25 февраля 1630 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 октября 1647 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности норт пелхам кеметири, пелхам, хиллсбороую, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.
